narrative:
Lake Twp Millbury Vill (precinct in Wood County) has 822 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points.
